case_title: EXTRA SPACE MANAGEMENT,INC., VS. JESSE MEJIA et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MEJIA, JESSE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EXTRA SPACE MANAGEMENT,INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEJIA, JESSE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1400 FOLSOM STREET, #C1033 AND D2037, S.F. CA. 94103, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EXTRA SPACE MANAGEMENT,INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MEJIA, JESSE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION SUPPLEMENTAL OF ATTORNEY OF STACEY A MILLER IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EXTRA SPACE MANAGEMENT,INC.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MEJIA, JESSE
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT, ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING FILED BY PLAINTIFF EXTRA SPACE MANAGEMENT,INC. SERVED MAY-28-2008, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT MEJIA, JESSE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MEJIA, JESSE
AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $662.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MEJIA, JESSE
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT MEJIA, JESSE
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF EXTRA SPACE MANAGEMENT,INC.
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS
DECLARATION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY COURT, CCP 585D FILED BY PLAINTIFF EXTRA SPACE MANAGEMENT,INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EXTRA SPACE MANAGEMENT,INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEJIA, JESSE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: DEFENDANT VACATED ON 7/9/08, $1,398.00 RENT, $500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $662.50 COSTS, $1,022.54 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,583.04, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
